<?php namespace Twilio\Jwt\TaskRouter; class WorkspaceCapability extends CapabilityToken { public function __construct(string $accountSid, string $authToken, string $workspaceSid, ?string $overrideBaseUrl = null, ?string $overrideBaseWSUrl = null) { parent::__construct($accountSid, $authToken, $workspaceSid, $workspaceSid, null, $overrideBaseUrl, $overrideBaseWSUrl); } protected function setupResource(): void { $this->resourceUrl = $this->baseUrl; } }
